positive: A majestic, minimalist line-art illustration of an intricate cosmic forest scene. Depict bioluminescent flora and fauna intertwined with geometric constellations and stylized crescent moons. The composition must be symmetrical and centered, featuring strong, contrasting silhouettes of stylized trees and ethereal creatures. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, electric teal, and luminous gold, set against a rich, dark midnight background. The style should mimic elegant woodblock printing meets modern scientific illustration, ensuring crisp lines, solid color areas, and high visual contrast for textile printing. High detail, vector aesthetic, perfect for screen printing.
